brief: A warm, craft-first small-batch coffee roaster; hand-drawn serif, earthy palette of espresso and oat cream.

result.note: Critic was strict (threshold 70); both assets scored 62/65. FLUX garbled the wordmark text (a known FLUX limitation) and the critic correctly flagged it with actionable hex/legibility fixes. Complete kits are achievable by tuning critic_pass_threshold, selecting text-light assets, or raising max_retries. The pipeline, swap scheduler, bounded loop, and partial-kit resilience are all verified end-to-end.
